name: capture_screenshot
description: Capture a screenshot of the current scene from the Scene View camera or a game camera. Returns the file path of the saved PNG image — use your Read tool on that path to view it. The scene view captures what is visible in the Scene tab. The game camera captures what the main camera sees (excluding Screen Space - Overlay UI). Useful for verifying layout, lighting, and object placement.

source.description: Which camera to capture from. 'scene' = Scene View camera (default, always works). 'game' = the main game camera (Camera.main). Note: Screen Space - Overlay UI is only visible in the game source.

width.description: Image width in pixels. Default: 1920. Max: 3840.

height.description: Image height in pixels. Default: 1080. Max: 2160.
